text_blocks.text: Damascus), Umar ibn Abd al-Aziz, is
unanimously praised by Sunni sources for
his devout piety and justice. In his
efforts to spread Islam he established
liberties for the Mawali by abolishing the
jizya tax for converts to Islam. Imam
Hakam stated that Umar ibn Abd
allowance offered to his relatives stating
that he could only give them an allowance
if he gave an allowance to everyone else in
the empire. Umar ibn Abd al-Aziz
was later poisoned in the year 720. When
